title: Senior Engineer, AI/Machine Learning
company_focus:
Medical device company advancing patient care through
innovative heart valve treatments
description:
Edwards Lifesciences is expanding its global technology
capabilities with the launch of a new IT Innovation Hub in
Pune, India. The Hub strengthens the technology foundation
that supports our business worldwide, working in close
partnership with teams across regions to deliver reliable,
high-quality solutions at scale.

Designed as a long-term investment, the Pune Hub will
advance newer digital capabilities such as automation, data,
AI, and cloud, and will include roles spanning end user
services, application development, and enterprise platform
teams.

Together, these teams will help Edwards operate more
efficiently

and accelerate innovation in support of our mission of
advancing patient care.

How will you make an impact:

- Provide highly complex design, development and deployment of
  scalable and efficient AI/ML models both for prototyping
  purposes as well as for production deployment.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams (data scientists,
  software engineers, product managers, business leads) to
  define requirements and ideate solutions using AI/ML
  frameworks.
- Participate in agile development processes, including sprint
  planning, daily stand-ups and demo prototypes or milestone
  updates when necessary
- Drive research and experimentation to explore new AI/ML
  techniques, tools, and frameworks.
- Build end-to-end data pipelines for collecting, processing,
  and analyzing large-scale datasets.
- Ensure code and model development are well-documented and
  follow best engineering practices.
- Improve and optimize the performance of models, ensuring
  robustness, scalability, and efficiency.
- Other incidental duties

What you'll need (Required):

- Bachelor's Degree in Engineering or technical field.
- 4 years experience in Software Development or Engineering
  demonstrably solid performance in a role working with
  cross-functional teams (within IT and/or within the
  business) on enterprise-level or complex/novel system
  implementations Required
- Proficiency in programming languages such as Python, Java,
  C++, or similar.
- Experience with machine learning libraries and frameworks
  (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, Keras, etc.).
- Strong understanding of machine learning algorithms,
  statistics, and data structures.
- Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS or Cloud
  Infrastructure services for model deployment and data
  storage.
- Familiarity with big data technologies like Hadoop, Spark,
  or similar tools is a plus.
- Solid experience with version control systems (Git) and
  agile development methodologies.
- Experience with deep learning techniques (e.g., CNNs, RNNs,
  GANs, etc.).
- Knowledge of data engineering practices and tools like
  Apache Kafka, Airflow, etc.

What else we look for (Preferred):

- Strong communication skills and the ability to work
  effectively in cross-functional teams.
- Excellent problem solving skills
- Strict attention to detail
- Ability to manage competing priorities in a fast paced
  environment
- Adhere to all company rules and requirements (e.g., pandemic
  protocols, Environmental Health & Safety rules) and take
  adequate control measures in preventing injuries to
  themselves and others as well as to the protection of
  environment and prevention of pollution under their span
  of influence/control
responsibilities: Design, develop, and deploy scalable AI/ML models for prototyping and production environments
Collaborate with cross-functional teams including data scientists, software engineers, product managers, and business leads to define requirements and ideate AI/ML solutions
Participate in agile development processes including sprint planning, stand-ups, and prototype demos
Drive research and experimentation to explore new AI/ML techniques, tools, and frameworks
Build end-to-end data pipelines for collecting, processing, and analyzing large-scale datasets
Ensure code and model development are well-documented following best engineering practices
Improve and optimize model performance ensuring robustness, scalability, and efficiency
use_cases: AI/ML-powered solutions for medical device and patient care innovation
Enterprise automation and data-driven decision support
Large-scale data processing and analytics for healthcare applications
Scalable production AI/ML model deployment within IT infrastructure
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly building, developing, and
deploying AI/ML models (TensorFlow, PyTorch, deep learning
techniques like CNNs, RNNs, GANs) for both prototyping and
production. The engineer will design scalable AI/ML models,
optimize performance, and work hands-on with ML frameworks,
making this an ai-first role.
